_comment: Example config for cmd/persistence-dispatcher. JSON does not support comments, so _comment fields are documentation and are ignored by the Go loader.

nats._comment: The dispatcher consumes jobs.discovered and publishes jobs.saved plus jobs.description.fetch.requested into this stream.

sqlite._comment: SQLite database file used for jobs, descriptions, event audit rows, source runs, and scheduler state.

consumer._comment: Durable pull consumer settings for jobs.discovered. fetch_wait controls how long one fetch call waits for messages.
